                  0 Г— 10вҖ“1 + 3 Г— 10вҖ“2 + 8 Г— 10вҖ“3 + 4 Г— 10вҖ“4 + 1 Г— 10вҖ“5 = 0.03841


     Similarly, the base 2 number 0.01101 has the value

stem.rawText:
The base 10 number 0.03841 has the value

                  0 Г— 10вҖ“1 + 3 Г— 10вҖ“2 + 8 Г— 10вҖ“3 + 4 Г— 10вҖ“4 + 1 Г— 10вҖ“5 = 0.03841


     Similarly, the base 2 number 0.01101 has the value

                                                                            13
                        0 Г— 2вҖ“1 + 1 Г— 2вҖ“2 + 1 Г— 2вҖ“3 + 0 Г— 2вҖ“4 + 1 Г— 2вҖ“5 =
                                                                            32

                                                          .   .
     What is the value of the recurring base 2 number 0. 0011 = 0.001100110011 вҖҰ ?

         1

solution.rawText:
Approach 1
Using the rule for working out the value of a base 2 number, we have

0.0МҮ011МҮ = 0.001100110011 . . .
       = 0 Г— 2вҲ’1 + 0 Г— 2вҲ’2 + 1 Г— 2вҲ’3 + 1 Г— 2вҲ’4 + 0 Г— 2вҲ’5 + 0 Г— 2вҲ’6 + 1 Г— 2вҲ’7 + 1 Г— 2вҲ’8 + В· В· В·

Grouping these into sets of four consecutive terms gives

             0.0МҮ011МҮ = (0 Г— 2вҲ’1 + 0 Г— 2вҲ’2 + 1 Г— 2вҲ’3 + 1 Г— 2вҲ’4 ) +
                         (0 Г— 2вҲ’5 + 0 Г— 2вҲ’6 + 1 Г— 2вҲ’7 + 1 Г— 2вҲ’8 ) + В· В· В·
                     = (0 Г— 2вҲ’1 + 0 Г— 2вҲ’2 + 1 Г— 2вҲ’3 + 1 Г— 2вҲ’4 ) +
                        2вҲ’4 (0 Г— 2вҲ’1 + 0 Г— 2вҲ’2 + 1 Г— 2вҲ’3 + 1 Г— 2вҲ’4 ) + 2вҲ’8 (В· В· В· ) + В· В· В·
                                                             
                         1    1      вҲ’4 1       1      вҲ’8 1     1
                     =     +      +2        +       +2       +       + В·В·В·
                         8 16             8 16             8 16
                       3
                     = (1 + 2вҲ’4 + 2вҲ’8 + В· В· В· )
                       16
The term in brackets is an infinite geometric series with first term 1 and common ratio 2вҲ’4 , so
its sum is
                                       1          1      16
                                         вҲ’4
                                            =        1 = .
                                     1вҲ’2       1 вҲ’ 16    15
Therefore
                                                 3   16    3   1
                                    0.0МҮ011МҮ =     Г—    =    =
                                                 16 15    15   5
which is option B.

Approach 2
We have, on dropping zero terms and rearranging:

0.0МҮ011МҮ = 0.001100110011 . . .
       = 0 Г— 2вҲ’1 + 0 Г— 2вҲ’2 + 1 Г— 2вҲ’3 + 1 Г— 2вҲ’4 + 0 Г— 2вҲ’5 + 0 Г— 2вҲ’6 + 1 Г— 2вҲ’7 + 1 Г— 2вҲ’8 + В· В· В·
       = 2вҲ’3 + 2вҲ’4 + 2вҲ’7 + 2вҲ’8 + 2вҲ’11 + 2вҲ’12 + В· В· В·
       = (2вҲ’3 + 2вҲ’7 + 2вҲ’11 + В· В· В· ) + (2вҲ’4 + 2вҲ’8 + 2вҲ’12 + В· В· В· )

(Technical note: we are allowed to rearrange this infinite series as all of the terms are positive.)
We can now calculate the sums of these infinite geometric series to get

                                                2вҲ’3      2вҲ’4
                                    0.0МҮ011МҮ =        +
                                              1 вҲ’ 2вҲ’4 1 вҲ’ 2вҲ’4
                                                 2      1
                                            =        +
                                              16 вҲ’ 1 16 вҲ’ 1
                                              3
                                            =
                                              15
                                              1
                                            =
                                              5




Version 1.0, September 2023                                                                   Page 17
 
Test of Mathematics for University Admission (TMUA), 2023 Paper 2 Solutions


Approach 3
We can adapt the method used to evaluate a base 10 recurring decimal.
Let x = 0.0МҮ011МҮ = 0.001100110011 . . . . Then writing a subscript вҖҳ2вҖҷ to indicate base 2 and a
subscript вҖҳ10вҖҷ to indicate the usual base 10, we have

                                           x = (0.001100110011 . . . )2
                              so       1610 x = (11.001100110011 . . . )2
                              giving   1510 x = 112

Now 112 = 1 Г— 21 + 1 Г— 20 = 310 , so we have (in base 10) 15x = 3, yielding x = 51 , which is
option B.
